title: Serialization / save stall
symptoms: save game or state serialization runs on the main thread
hitch at a checkpoint or autosave
write or deserialize work stalls the frame
mechanism: Game state is serialized (saved) or deserialized synchronously on the main thread, so the write and any disk flush block gameplay for a frame.
diagnosis_hints: Check whether the spike coincides with a save / checkpoint event and whether the work could run off-thread.
typical_fixes: serialize on a background thread and write asynchronously
split large saves into chunks across frames
snapshot state cheaply, then serialize the snapshot off the hot path
